evals.prompt: Polish an existing card component that feels flat and misaligned.
evals.expected_behavior: Inspects existing styles, preserves the visual system, maps changes to concrete polish principles, and avoids new dependencies.
assertions: Separates detail polish from broad redesign
Uses existing tokens/utilities before adding patterns

evals.prompt: Make this modal screen-reader accessible and fix keyboard focus traps.
evals.expected_behavior: Does not treat accessibility compliance as visual feel polish.
assertions: Acknowledges accessibility is the primary task
Does not focus on radius/shadows/motion as the main solution
